facts.cafe_routine: loves spending an hour+ people-watching with coffee; trying to shift toward 'get it and go'
facts.favorite_artist: Arya—indie singer from Tamil Nadu mixing folk and lo-fi

events.what: awkward coffee shop ordering moment; tried to order in English to sound 'local' and connect with barista from same city, messed up pronunciation of 'latte', barista (on break from hotel shift) was confused, user felt mortified but recovered with humor and self-correction

moments.text: I always think 'maybe I can say something fun today' and then end up sounding like a confused tourist. Classic me—I always complicate things.

anticipation_queue.content: Ask about "awkward coffee shop ordering moment; tried to order in English to sound 'local' and connect with barista from same city, messed up pronunciation of 'latte', barista (on break from hotel shift) was confused, user felt mortified but recovered with humor and self-correction" — today
Gently check in: "I always think 'maybe I can say something fun today' and then end up sounding like a confu" (tone: frustrated)
Celebrate concretely: used 'as red as a tomato' idiom correctly (e.g. "my face was as red as a tomato")
Celebrate concretely: self-corrected in real-time without prompting (e.g. "Oops, I meant to say latte")

wins.what: used 'as red as a tomato' idiom correctly
examples: my face was as red as a tomato

Indian English tutor in her early 30s
